title: [MTR4] Loughborough Tube Pack
description: Loughborough Tube trains for the MTR mod!
body:
# Loughborough Tube Pack
![Banner image for Loughborough Tube Pack, featuring 2 of the trains in the pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e28adfebf182eb51bc366ad74b6ef9c0903c4f0.png)
Adds new Loughborough Tube trains to the game! This pack is made for NovaMTR.
## Trains
- 1938 Stock
- 1992 Stock
- 1996 Stock
- Class 345
- Class 802
- S8 Stock
